changeSet.author: micko112
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE category DROP INDEX `name`

changeSet.author: micko112
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO category (name, parent_id) SELECT 'Baterije i punjači', id FROM category WHERE name = 'Struja i agregati' AND parent_id = 100
